description.ko: 빛이 우주의 영원한 침묵 속으로 사라지는 가장 먼 곳을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 공허함 속에 숨겨진 두려울 만큼 아름다운 심연을 드러냅니다.
description.en: A visual exploration into the furthest reaches of the universe where light fades into the eternal silence of the cosmic deep, revealing the terrifying beauty of the void.

prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic shot of a vast cosmic abyss, swirling dark matter nebulae with glowing bioluminescent star-clusters, a singular massive black hole at the center distorting light into a vibrant event horizon, deep indigo and obsidian color palette, ethereal particles, 8k resolution, cosmic horror aesthetic, immense scale and silent atmosphere.
